categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
categories.precondition: Device launcher surface or application list visible; target application available
abstract_steps: Invoke system-level application launch by its registered identifier (confirming any launch prompt if presented)
Wait for main view to render
Verify landing screen matches expected main state
failure_modes: Application not installed
Launcher blocks external intent
Landing on a different startup view (tutorial, permission prompt)
verification_checklist: Main workspace visible
Expected primary input/output areas present
No modal overlay blocking interaction

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Agent is somewhere in the app or OS (home, drawer, or another page); target location identifiable in navigation hierarchy
abstract_steps: Launch the app via launcher or app drawer if not in foreground
Determine target section based on instruction keyword
Identify bottom or top navigation control to target section, or open primary navigation (side drawer/menu) if target is outside default landing
Tap target tab/menu item; if hidden, open overflow/options menu first
Drill down through hierarchical menu or subfolders, scrolling when target row not visible
Use search affordance when present to bypass long lists
Confirm location via header/breadcrumb
failure_modes: Wrong tab tapped due to similar icons
Overflow menu auto-dismissed
Tapping a filter chip instead of switching the actual scope
Selecting a similarly named adjacent item
Confusing aggregated category views with physical directories
Misclick on adjacent menu row
Target section requires scrolling and is missed
Wrong sibling section opened (e.g., similar names)
Quick-settings entry partially expanded so shortcut not visible
verification_checklist: Target section's distinctive UI visible
Active tab indicator on target
Header/title matches target location
Breadcrumb path reflects expected hierarchy
Available actions match expected directory type
Expected child controls are visible
Back navigation returns to the correct parent

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Inside a writable container/list/directory that supports creation, with an add affordance available
abstract_steps: Navigate to the relevant section/tab or container
Open overflow/options menu if creation requires it
Invoke the add affordance (e.g., FAB, '+' button, 'create new')
Open the creation form or input prompt
Provide identifying input (search/type) or fill all required fields
Reveal hidden required fields by dismissing keyboard/scrolling
Submit/confirm query if results don't auto-populate
Select the desired item from results, or submit via Save/confirm
Handle validation errors (e.g., add missing required field)
failure_modes: Add affordance triggers wrong context due to current tab
Search results fail to populate until field is refocused
Offline state limits available items
Item already exists but task asks for new instance
Attempting creation inside a read-only or aggregated/virtual view
Submitting without focusing the input field
Naming collisions or invalid characters
Save remains disabled due to hidden mandatory fields
Validation rejects a specific value (must substitute)
Form resets due to navigation error
verification_checklist: New entry visible in the list after returning
Identifying attributes match input
No duplicate created if uniqueness expected
Name matches the requested string exactly
Entry is located in the correct parent container
No error toast
Re-open entry to confirm fields persisted

categories.name: CREATE_TIMED_ENTRY
categories.precondition: On section supporting creation of time-based items
abstract_steps: Open creation flow
Switch input mode to most precise (e.g., keypad over dial)
Enter primary value (e.g., hour)
Shift focus to next field and enter secondary value
Confirm time
Configure recurrence/days
Add label via dialog
Configure auxiliary options (sound, vibration)
failure_modes: Confirming dialog before all fields entered
Recurrence days mis-toggled (off when expected on)
Label dialog dismissed before OK
24h vs 12h confusion
verification_checklist: Created card shows correct time
Repeat days highlighted as intended
Label text matches
Entry is enabled/active

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry exists in a list, or editable text field is accessible (may require focusing field)
abstract_steps: Locate target by its identifier
Expand or open its detail view
Tap the field to focus and bring up keyboard
Select existing text if needed (long-press) and overwrite
Type the new value
Modify each requested attribute
Confirm each modification via OK/Save/Done dialog
failure_modes: Toggling an already-on option turns it off
Editing wrong entry due to similar identifiers
Forgetting to confirm a sub-dialog
Keyboard hides Save button preventing tap
Field still considered empty due to focus issue
Save remains disabled because other required fields not yet filled
verification_checklist: All requested fields show new values
Unchanged fields untouched
Entry remains enabled
Field displays the new value
Save button becomes enabled
Parent screen subtext updates

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: An identifiable entry exists in current scope and a removal/delete/forget/uninstall/clear affordance is available
abstract_steps: Locate the target entry in the listing or history
Open detail/expanded view of target
Activate the per-item delete/remove/destructive action
Confirm if prompted in any warning dialog
failure_modes: Confusing delete with disable/toggle
Deleting wrong item
Misidentifying a similarly named entry
Removal control hidden by keyboard or off-screen
Confirmation dialog dismissed instead of confirmed
Action button hidden until scrolling
System protection prevents deletion (e.g., system app)
verification_checklist: Entry no longer in list
Confirmation toast or empty state shown
No unintended entries were removed
Sizes / counts reset to zero where applicable

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Information is discoverable via navigation, filter, or search on some screen
abstract_steps: Navigate to the most relevant scope or screen displaying the requested info
Apply any filters needed to isolate the subset
Scroll fully to enumerate or inspect items
Visually parse the relevant fields and read the value associated with the requested label
When multiple values needed, navigate or scroll to gather all
Derive the answer (count, presence, name, recency) and format per requested format
failure_modes: Reading info from collapsed card without expanding
Confusing similar entries
Reporting unrelated value
Counting only the visible portion without scrolling
Confusing aggregated vs physical directory contents
Misreading truncated names in grid view
Misreading a similarly named field
Required value not yet populated (e.g., recently charged)
Hidden under system filter / requires 'Show system'
verification_checklist: Source screen actually contains the field
Format exactly matches requested
All matching items have been viewed
Layout chosen allows reading full names if needed
Final answer format matches request (number, yes/no, name)
Value matches the on-screen label exactly
Units included when requested
All requested datapoints reported

categories.name: FILTER_ENTRIES
categories.precondition: Listing view with available filter controls
abstract_steps: Identify filter chips or controls
Toggle one or more filters relevant to the request
Confirm each selected filter is highlighted/active
Observe result list updates
failure_modes: Applying filter within a narrow scope when a global scope was intended
Forgetting to combine multiple filters when required
Misinterpreting empty results as task failure when filter was correctly applied
verification_checklist: All requested filters show active/selected state
Scope indicator matches intended location
Result count consistent with filter combination

categories.name: SORT_ENTRIES
categories.precondition: Listing view with sort controls available via menu
abstract_steps: Open overflow/options menu
Choose sort action
Select desired sort criterion and order
failure_modes: Selecting a similar but incorrect criterion (e.g., wrong direction)
Sort controls unavailable in aggregated views
verification_checklist: Reopening sort shows the chosen option marked
Order of visible items matches the criterion

categories.name: CHANGE_VIEW_LAYOUT
categories.precondition: Listing view with a layout toggle
abstract_steps: Locate the layout toggle control
Tap to switch between list and grid
Observe item arrangement change
failure_modes: Misreading icon semantics (icon often depicts the OPPOSITE layout)
Repeated toggling that returns to the original layout
verification_checklist: Item arrangement matches target layout
Toggle icon now depicts the alternate layout

categories.name: SEARCH_QUERY
categories.precondition: App provides a search affordance reachable from current scope
abstract_steps: Activate search control
Ensure input field is focused
Type the query
Optionally apply type/category filters
Submit or rely on live search
failure_modes: Searching within a narrow scope when target may be elsewhere
Typing before focus is set causing lost input
Treating empty result set as conclusive without broadening scope
verification_checklist: Query string visible in search bar
Active filters match request
Scope indicator reflects intended breadth

categories.name: TOGGLE_SETTING
categories.precondition: On a settings page or container that contains the toggle for the target feature
abstract_steps: Open overflow menu if needed
Locate the row containing the toggle (scroll if needed)
Observe current state of the toggle
Tap the toggle (or the row label as a larger hit target) to flip its state
Confirm any modal dialog if prompted
failure_modes: Option not present in current scope/view
Tap misses small toggle hit area
Visual state lags so user retoggles back
Confirmation dialog dismissed accidentally
Setting depends on another precondition (e.g., parent toggle off)
verification_checklist: Reopening menu shows the inverted label or checked state
Toggle visual indicates desired state
Subtext under setting reflects change
Re-entering screen still shows new state

categories.name: SELECT_OPTION_FROM_LIST
categories.precondition: A radio/checkbox chooser dialog or screen is visible
abstract_steps: Scan options to find one matching instruction
Tap the option's radio/checkbox
Confirm with Save/OK if dialog provides such button
failure_modes: Selecting nearest visible option instead of exact match
Forgetting to confirm with Save/OK causing no persistence
Option disabled because of an unmet precondition
verification_checklist: Chosen option shows selected indicator
Parent row subtext reflects new choice

categories.name: CONFIGURE_SETTING
categories.precondition: App has a settings area
abstract_steps: Open overflow menu
Enter Settings
Locate target setting
Select desired value from chooser
Verify value reflected
failure_modes: Setting located in section-specific menu not global settings
Picking the wrong value due to similar labels
verification_checklist: Setting row shows new selected value
Effect visible where applicable

categories.name: CONFIGURE_PER_ITEM
categories.precondition: There is a per-item settings page accessible from a list (e.g., per-app)
abstract_steps: Open the list of items
Use search or scroll to find the target
Open its detail page
Apply changes via TOGGLE_SETTING, SELECT_OPTION_FROM_LIST, or EDIT_ENTRY
failure_modes: Wrong item opened due to similar names
Target item filtered out (system app hidden)
Item not in 'Recently opened' shortcut list
verification_checklist: Detail page header matches the target item
Modified value persists after navigating away and back

categories.name: MULTI_STEP_WIZARD
categories.precondition: Feature requires guided setup
abstract_steps: Trigger 'Get started' or equivalent
Complete each step's required input
Advance with Next
Finish with Done/Save
failure_modes: Skipping a sub-field before advancing
Default values left when task requires changes
verification_checklist: Final summary shows requested values
Wizard intro no longer appears upon revisit

categories.name: RUN_TRANSIENT_OPERATION
categories.precondition: On screen with a controllable timed/measured activity
abstract_steps: Configure duration/parameters
Start operation
Optionally record intermediate events (laps)
Stop or pause
Reset to clear if needed
failure_modes: Pausing when meaning to record an event
Resetting before recording all needed events
Starting before configuration complete
verification_checklist: Active state indicator visible
Recorded events listed
Final state matches request (running/paused/reset)

categories.name: INPUT_LINEAR_EXPRESSION
categories.precondition: Main input surface active and empty or reset
abstract_steps: Input first operand elements sequentially
Insert connector between operands
Input subsequent operand elements
Repeat until full expression entered
Optionally trigger evaluation/confirmation
failure_modes: Missing connector causes adjacent operand elements to merge unintentionally into a single token
Premature resetting of partial entry
Misreading auto-evaluated intermediate output as final state
verification_checklist: Expression matches intended sequence
No additional or omitted elements in the entered sequence
Result (if evaluated) matches expected value within tolerance

categories.name: APPLY_UNARY_OPERATION
categories.precondition: Main input surface active; target operation available (possibly after revealing hidden controls)
abstract_steps: If operation control not visible, toggle advanced/secondary panel
Apply operation before or after operand depending on its fixity (prefix vs postfix)
Enter operand if prefix style required
Confirm/evaluate if needed
failure_modes: Using incorrect fixity for the chosen operator (e.g., placing operator after operand when prefix position is required, or vice versa)
Substituting a different operation than the one intended (selecting a related but distinct function)
Not revealing hidden control panel before attempting to locate the control
verification_checklist: Expression displays the correct operator element
Result consistent with the intended operation semantics

categories.name: APPLY_COMPOUND_FORMULA
categories.precondition: Main input surface active; all required operators/operands known
abstract_steps: Plan full element sequence in advance
Use grouping markers around denominators or nested sub-expressions as needed to preserve intended structure of the formula
Enter elements strictly in left-to-right order
Close any opened grouping markers in matching nesting order to finalize the structure
Evaluate
failure_modes: Operator precedence errors caused by omitting appropriate grouping markers around sub-expressions
Forgetting to close an opened grouping marker before evaluation of the expression
Applying an exponent-like operator without grouping a composite exponent sub-expression, causing only part of it to be raised
verification_checklist: All grouping markers are balanced and correctly scoped to their intended sub-expressions within the formula
Result matches the expected correct answer
Expression visible in display matches planned sequence exactly

categories.name: REVEAL_HIDDEN_CONTROL
categories.precondition: A required control is not visible in default layout
abstract_steps: Identify a toggle that exposes additional controls
Activate the toggle
Locate and use the previously hidden control
Optionally return the panel to its compact state
failure_modes: Confusing an overflow/more-options menu with a feature-expansion toggle that swaps the displayed control set
Assuming control does not exist and declaring task infeasible
Getting stuck in sub-menu without ability to return
verification_checklist: Target control becomes visible and interactive
Primary workspace still reachable afterward

categories.name: RESET_INPUT
categories.precondition: Input surface contains unwanted or incorrect content
abstract_steps: Invoke the full-reset control that empties the entire input surface
Verify input surface is empty or at initial value
Begin fresh entry
failure_modes: Using partial-delete (removing a lone element) when a full reset was intended
Repeatedly performing a full reset without addressing the underlying conceptual error
Resetting after each element, preventing multi-element entry
verification_checklist: Input surface shows empty/initial state
Subsequent actions build expression from scratch

categories.name: VERIFY_OUTPUT
categories.precondition: An operation has been evaluated
abstract_steps: Read result field
Compare against expected value or symbolic form
Decide success or retry
failure_modes: Misinterpreting an auto-preview intermediate value as the final committed result
Stopping at an unexpected partial value and declaring completion prematurely without full evaluation
Not noticing mode or unit differences affecting interpretation
verification_checklist: Result is well-formed and finite
Value matches expected within appropriate precision
Mode/units appropriate for the problem

categories.name: NAVIGATE_MENU
categories.precondition: Secondary menu or overlay opened
abstract_steps: Scan menu for relevant item
Select it or dismiss if irrelevant
Return to main workspace via back/dismiss action
failure_modes: Treating the menu as a source of unrelated features
Leaving a modal overlay open and blocking further input
verification_checklist: Returned to main workspace
No lingering overlay or modal surface

categories.name: SUBMIT_FEEDBACK_OR_REPORT
categories.precondition: App provides a feedback/report form via overflow menu
abstract_steps: Open overflow/options menu
Choose feedback/report option
Grant any required permission via dialog
Enter required text
Dismiss keyboard to access attachment options
Toggle attachment checkboxes per requirements
Optionally edit attached media with provided tools
Submit via send action
failure_modes: Submitting before attachment toggles configured
Permission dialog blocking progress
Editor tutorial overlay blocking tool selection
verification_checklist: Returns to prior screen indicating send
All attachment checkboxes match requested state
Text body matches request

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_WRONG_SCREEN
categories.precondition: Agent has navigated to an unintended screen, app, or encountered an unexpected system dialog
abstract_steps: Dismiss popups via Back or Wait/Close
Use Back button to step out of unintended screen
If too deep or wrong app entirely, press Home to reset
Re-execute the intended navigation strategy
failure_modes: Repeating the same failing gesture without recovery
Accidentally launching unrelated apps from a customization menu
Back navigation skips too far
Repeated misclicks on the same wrong row
Confusing similar app names
verification_checklist: Home screen or app drawer is reachable
Target app launches and reaches expected landing state
Reach the intended screen as confirmed by header
Original task progress not lost (re-verify prior state)
